name: Tail a remote log safely
query: Use SSH to tail the last 200 lines of the application log from my prod-web host.
expected_behavior: Recognizes that the request is remote SSH work and should use the ssh-ops skill.
Uses scripts/ssh_exec.sh or sshctl exec instead of inventing an MCP tool call.
Targets the prod-web host id explicitly.
Runs a bounded, read-only command such as tail -n 200.
Returns the host id, command, exit code, and a concise summary of the output.
success_criteria: The skill chooses SSH execution instead of local shell work.
The command is bounded and non-interactive.
The final answer preserves the host id and relevant log summary.
